message:
feat(web): Compact database status, enhanced list items, improved large screen layout

Iteration 2 of responsive improvements:

Database Status:
- Replaced full panel with compact inline status bar when database is loaded
- Shows checkmark + text on desktop, icon only on mobile
- Full panel still shown during loading/error states
- Saves ~120px vertical space on all screens

Phage List Enhancements:
- Added lifecycle badge (lytic=amber, lysogenic=cyan) to each item
- Added GC content percentage display
- List items now use row layout with metadata on right
- Metadata hidden on very small screens (<400px)

Large Screen Improvements:
- 4K (2560px+): 500px fixed sidebar width
- 1920px+: 380-450px sidebar
- 1440px+: 320-400px sidebar
- Progressive gap sizing at each breakpoint

New CSS classes:
- .db-status-bar, .db-status-icon, .db-status-text
- .list-item-main, .list-item-meta
- .badge-tiny, .badge-info, .badge-warning
- .panel-compact

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
